description: API 设计与身份验证命令模块，涵盖 RESTful API、GraphQL、JWT、OAuth2、Passport.js、bcrypt、TOTP、限流、CORS、安全头等

commands.name: jwt.sign 生成 JWT 令牌
commands.keyword: jwt.sign jwt生成 jwt签发
commands.description: 使用 jsonwebtoken 库签发 JWT 访问令牌或刷新令牌

data.cmd: jwt.sign(%{payload}%, process.env.%{密钥环境变量}%, { expiresIn: '%{过期时间}%', algorithm: '%{算法}%' })

extensions.name: 生成访问令牌
extensions.cmd: jwt.sign({ userId: %{userId}%, role: '%{角色}%' }, process.env.%{环境变量}%, { expiresIn: '15m' })

extensions.name: 生成刷新令牌
extensions.cmd: jwt.sign({ userId: %{userId}%, type: 'refresh' }, process.env.%{环境变量}%, { expiresIn: '7d' })

环境变量.description: 刷新令牌密钥环境变量

extensions.name: 带算法和签发者
extensions.cmd: jwt.sign({ userId: %{userId}% }, process.env.%{secret}%, { expiresIn: '%{expiry}%', algorithm: '%{algo}%', issuer: '%{issuer}%', audience: '%{aud}%' })

payload.description: JWT 负载对象（用户信息）

commands.name: jwt.verify 验证 JWT 令牌
commands.keyword: jwt.verify jwt验证 jwt校验
commands.description: 验证并解码 JWT 令牌，校验签名、过期时间、签发者和受众。该命令是相关技术栈中的常用操作，掌握其用法对于日常开发和运维工作非常重要

data.cmd: jwt.verify(%{token}%, process.env.%{密钥环境变量}%, { algorithms: ['%{算法}%'], issuer: '%{issuer}%', audience: '%{audience}%' })

extensions.name: 基础验证
extensions.cmd: jwt.verify(%{token}%, process.env.%{secret}%)

extensions.name: 完整验证（签名+过期+issuer+audience）
extensions.cmd: jwt.verify(%{token}%, process.env.%{secret}%, { algorithms: ['%{algo}%'], issuer: '%{issuer}%', audience: '%{audience}%' })

extensions.name: 带 try-catch 异常处理
extensions.cmd: try { const decoded = jwt.verify(%{token}%, process.env.%{secret}%); } catch (e) { if (e.name === 'TokenExpiredError') { /* 令牌过期 */ } else if (e.name === 'JsonWebTokenError') { /* 签名无效 */ } }

commands.name: jwt.decode 解码 JWT 令牌
commands.keyword: jwt.decode jwt解码 jwt查看
commands.description: 解码 JWT 令牌为 header 和 payload（不验证签名，仅用于查看）

extensions.name: 完整解码（包含 header 和 signature）
extensions.cmd: jwt.decode(%{token}%, { complete: true })

extensions.name: 仅解码 payload
extensions.cmd: jwt.decode(%{token}%)

commands.name: bcrypt.hash 哈希密码
commands.keyword: bcrypt.hash bcrypt哈希 密码哈希
commands.description: 使用 bcrypt 将明文密码哈希为安全存储格式。该命令是相关技术栈中的常用操作，掌握其用法对于日常开发和运维工作非常重要

extensions.name: 标准哈希（12 轮盐）
extensions.cmd: bcrypt.hash(%{password}%, 12)

extensions.name: 异步哈希
extensions.cmd: const hash = await bcrypt.hash(%{password}%, %{rounds}%)

commands.name: bcrypt.compare 验证密码
commands.keyword: bcrypt.compare bcrypt验证 密码校验
commands.description: 将用户输入的明文密码与数据库中存储的 bcrypt 哈希值进行比对

extensions.name: 登录时验证
extensions.cmd: const match = await bcrypt.compare(req.body.%{passwordField}%, storedHash); if (!match) return res.status(401).json({ error: '无效凭证' });

passwordField.description: 请求体中的密码字段名

storedHash.description: 数据库中存储的密码哈希

extensions.name: 异步密码验证
extensions.cmd: const isValid = await bcrypt.compare(%{input}%, %{hash}%);

passwordHash.description: 数据库中存储的 bcrypt 哈希值

commands.name: speakeasy.totp.verify 验证 TOTP 验证码
commands.keyword: speakeasy totp verify 2fa验证 双重认证
commands.description: 使用 speakeasy 验证用户提供的 TOTP 验证码（两步验证）

extensions.name: 标准 TOTP 验证
extensions.cmd: speakeasy.totp.verify({ secret: user.%{totpSecretField}%, encoding: 'base32', token: req.body.%{codeField}%, window: 1 })

totpSecretField.description: 用户 TOTP 密钥字段名

codeField.description: 用户提交的验证码字段

extensions.name: 严格模式（不允许时间窗口误差）
extensions.cmd: speakeasy.totp.verify({ secret: %{secret}%, encoding: 'base32', token: %{token}%, window: 0 })

token.description: 用户输入的 6 位验证码

secret.description: 用户的 TOTP 密钥（base32 编码）

token.description: 用户输入的 6 位 TOTP 验证码

window.description: 允许的时间步长误差范围
window.notes: 默认 0，建议 1 允许手机时间偏差

commands.name: speakeasy.generateSecret 生成 TOTP 密钥
commands.keyword: speakeasy generateSecret totp生成 2fa密钥
commands.description: 为用户生成 TOTP（基于时间的一次性密码）密钥，用于设置两步验证

extensions.name: 标准 TOTP 密钥生成
extensions.cmd: const secret = speakeasy.generateSecret({ name: '%{appName}:%{user}%', issuer: '%{issuer}%' }); const otpauthUrl = secret.otpauth_url;

user.description: 用户标识（邮箱或用户名）

issuer.notes: 用于 Google Authenticator 显示

extensions.name: 生成二维码数据 URL
extensions.cmd: const secret = speakeasy.generateSecret({ name: '%{name}%' }); const qrcodeUrl = await QRCode.toDataURL(secret.otpauth_url);

commands.name: passport.use 注册 Passport 策略
commands.keyword: passport use passport策略 passport注册
commands.description: 使用 Passport.js 注册认证策略（本地策略、JWT 策略、OAuth 策略）

extensions.name: 注册本地（用户名密码）策略
extensions.cmd: passport.use(new LocalStrategy({ usernameField: '%{usernameField}%', passwordField: '%{passwordField}%' }, async (%{username}%, %{password}%, done) => { const user = await User.findOne({ %{usernameField}% }); if (!user) return done(null, false); const match = await bcrypt.compare(%{password}%, user.passwordHash); return done(null, match ? user : false); }))

extensions.name: 注册 JWT 策略
extensions.cmd: passport.use(new JwtStrategy({ jwtFromRequest: ExtractJwt.fromAuthHeaderAsBearerToken(), secretOrKey: process.env.%{secret}%, issuer: '%{issuer}%' }, (payload, done) => { User.findById(payload.userId).then(u => done(null, u || false)).catch(e => done(e, false)); }))

extensions.name: 注册 Google OAuth 策略
extensions.cmd: passport.use(new GoogleStrategy({ clientID: process.env.%{clientID}%, clientSecret: process.env.%{clientSecret}%, callbackURL: '%{callbackURL}%' }, (accessToken, refreshToken, profile, done) => { User.findOrCreate({ googleId: profile.id }, (err, user) => done(err, user)); }))

clientID.description: Google OAuth 客户端 ID 环境变量名

clientSecret.description: Google OAuth 客户端密钥环境变量名

commands.name: express-rate-limit 配置限流
commands.keyword: rateLimit 限流 express-rate-limit 请求限流
commands.description: 使用 express-rate-limit 配置 API 请求频率限制，防止滥用和暴力攻击

extensions.name: 登录接口限流（严格）
extensions.cmd: app.use('/api/auth/login', rateLimit({ windowMs: 15 * 60 * 1000, max: 5, message: '登录尝试过于频繁，请 15 分钟后再试' }))

extensions.name: 全局 API 限流
extensions.cmd: app.use('/api', rateLimit({ windowMs: 60 * 1000, max: %{requests}%, standardHeaders: true, legacyHeaders: false }))

extensions.name: 滑动窗口限流
extensions.cmd: const limiter = rateLimit({ windowMs: %{windowMs}%, max: %{max}%, message: '%{msg}%' }); app.use(limiter);

maxRequests.description: 每个窗口内允许的最大请求数

message.example: 请求过于频繁，请稍后再试

commands.name: cors 配置跨域资源共享
commands.keyword: cors 跨域 cors配置 允许跨域
commands.description: 配置 Express CORS 中间件，控制哪些来源可以跨域访问 API

extensions.name: 仅允许指定域名
extensions.cmd: app.use(cors({ origin: ['https://%{domain1}%', 'https://%{domain2}%'], credentials: true }))

extensions.name: 开发环境（允许所有）
extensions.cmd: app.use(cors({ origin: true, credentials: true }))

extensions.name: 生产环境（严格）
extensions.cmd: app.use(cors({ origin: process.env.%{envVar}%, methods: ['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE'], allowedHeaders: ['Content-Type', 'Authorization'], exposedHeaders: ['X-Total-Count'], credentials: true, maxAge: 86400 }))

origin.description: 允许的来源（域名数组或 true）

commands.name: helmet 配置安全响应头
commands.keyword: helmet helmet安全 安全头 helmet配置
commands.description: 使用 Helmet.js 设置各类 HTTP 安全响应头（XSS 防护、CSP、X-Frame-Options 等）

extensions.name: Helmet 全部安全头
extensions.cmd: app.use(helmet({ contentSecurityPolicy: { directives: { defaultSrc: ["'self'"], scriptSrc: ["'self'"], styleSrc: ["'self'", 'https://fonts.googleapis.com'], imgSrc: ["'self'", 'data:', 'https:'] } }, hsts: { maxAge: 31536000, includeSubDomains: true } }));

extensions.name: HSTS 严格传输安全
extensions.cmd: app.use(helmet.hsts({ maxAge: %{seconds}%, includeSubDomains: true, preload: true }))

extensions.name: X-Frame-Options 防止点击劫持
extensions.cmd: app.use(helmet.frameguard({ action: 'deny' }))

commands.name: Joi 验证请求数据
commands.keyword: Joi validate 验证 joi校验 输入验证
commands.description: 使用 Joi 库对 API 请求参数和请求体进行 schema 校验

data.cmd: const schema = Joi.object({ %{fieldName}%: Joi.%{type}%().%{rules}% }); const { error, value } = schema.validate(req.%{bodyOrQuery}%);

extensions.name: 用户注册请求验证
extensions.cmd: const schema = Joi.object({ email: Joi.string().email().required(), password: Joi.string().min(8).pattern(/^(?=.*[a-z])(?=.*[A-Z])(?=.*\d)/).required(), name: Joi.string().min(2).max(50).required() });

extensions.name: ID 参数验证
extensions.cmd: const schema = Joi.object({ id: Joi.number().integer().positive().required() }); const { error } = schema.validate(req.params);

extensions.name: 分页参数验证
extensions.cmd: const schema = Joi.object({ page: Joi.number().integer().min(1).default(1), limit: Joi.number().integer().min(1).max(100).default(20) });

commands.name: Apollo Server 启动 GraphQL 服务
commands.keyword: Apollo Server graphql 启动 graphql服务器
commands.description: 使用 Apollo Server 启动 GraphQL API 服务，配置 typeDefs 和 resolvers

data.cmd: const server = new ApolloServer({ typeDefs: gql`%{typeDefs}%`, resolvers }); server.listen().then(({ url }) => console.log(`Server at ${url}`));

extensions.name: 基础 Apollo Server
extensions.cmd: const { ApolloServer, gql } = require('apollo-server'); const typeDefs = gql`type Query { hello: String }`; const resolvers = { Query: { hello: () => 'Hello world' } }; const server = new ApolloServer({ typeDefs, resolvers }); server.listen().then(({ url }) => console.log(`GraphQL: ${url}`));

extensions.name: Apollo Server + Context（认证）
extensions.cmd: const server = new ApolloServer({ typeDefs, resolvers, context: ({ req }) => { const token = req.headers.authorization?.replace('Bearer ', ''); const user = token ? jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET) : null; return { user }; } });

extensions.name: Apollo Server + Playground
extensions.cmd: const server = new ApolloServer({ typeDefs, resolvers, introspection: true, playground: { settings: { 'request.credentials': 'include' } } });

commands.name: graphql-yoga 启动 GraphQL 服务
commands.keyword: graphql-yoga graphql yoga 启动
commands.description: 使用 graphql-yoga 创建高性能 GraphQL API 服务，支持 Express/Fastify 集成

data.cmd: const { createServer } = require('graphql-yoga'); const server = createServer({ schema: %{schema}%, port: %{port}% }); server.start();

extensions.name: 基础 graphql-yoga
extensions.cmd: const { createServer } = require('graphql-yoga'); const { schema } = require('./schema'); const server = createServer({ schema }); server.start();

extensions.name: graphql-yoga + CORS + context
extensions.cmd: const server = createServer({ schema, port: %{port}%, cors: { origin: '%{origin}%', credentials: true }, context: ({ request }) => { const token = request.headers.get('authorization')?.replace('Bearer ', ''); return { user: token ? jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET) : null }; } });

commands.name: crypto.randomBytes 生成 API Key
commands.keyword: crypto.randomBytes apikey api key 生成
commands.description: 使用 Node.js 原生 crypto 模块生成加密安全的随机 API Key

extensions.name: 生成 32 字节 API Key
extensions.cmd: const apiKey = crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex'); // 64 字符十六进制字符串

extensions.name: 生成带前缀的 API Key
extensions.cmd: const apiKey = `%{prefix}%_${crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex')}`;

bytes.notes: 推荐 32（生成 64 字符 Key）

commands.name: https.createServer 创建 HTTPS 服务器
commands.keyword: https createServer ssl https服务器
commands.description: 使用 Node.js 原生 https 模块和 SSL/TLS 证书创建安全的 HTTPS 服务器

data.cmd: const https = require('https'); const fs = require('fs'); const options = { key: fs.readFileSync('%{keyPath}%') , cert: fs.readFileSync('%{certPath}%') }; const server = https.createServer(options, app).listen(%{port}%);

extensions.name: 标准 HTTPS 服务器
extensions.cmd: const options = { key: fs.readFileSync('/etc/ssl/private/%{key}%') , cert: fs.readFileSync('/etc/ssl/certs/%{cert}%') , ca: fs.readFileSync('/etc/ssl/certs/ca_bundle.crt') }; https.createServer(options, app).listen(443);

extensions.name: HTTPS + TLS 1.2+ 强制
extensions.cmd: const options = { key: fs.readFileSync('%{key}%') , cert: fs.readFileSync('%{cert}%') , minVersion: 'TLSv1.2' , ciphers: 'ECDHE-RSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256:ECDHE-RSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384' }; https.createServer(options, app).listen(443);

extensions.name: HTTP 重定向到 HTTPS
extensions.cmd: http.createServer((req, res) => { res.writeHead(301, { Location: `https://${req.headers.host}${req.url}` }); res.end(); }).listen(80);

commands.name: session 配置 Express Session
commands.keyword: express-session session 会话 redis session
commands.description: 配置 Express 会话管理，支持内存存储和 Redis 分布式存储

data.cmd: const session = require('express-session'); app.use(session({ secret: process.env.%{secret}%, resave: false, saveUninitialized: false, cookie: { secure: %{secure}%, httpOnly: true, maxAge: %{maxAge}% } }));

extensions.name: Redis Session 存储
extensions.cmd: const RedisStore = require('connect-redis'); const redisClient = require('redis').createClient(); app.use(session({ store: new RedisStore({ client: redisClient }), secret: process.env.%{secret}%, resave: false, saveUninitialized: false, cookie: { secure: true, httpOnly: true, sameSite: 'strict' } }));

extensions.name: 安全 Session 配置
extensions.cmd: app.use(session({ secret: process.env.%{secret}%, cookie: { secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production', httpOnly: true, maxAge: 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000, sameSite: 'strict' } }));

secret.description: Session 签名密钥环境变量名

secure.description: 是否仅通过 HTTPS 传输

commands.name: pubsub.publish 发布 GraphQL 订阅事件
commands.keyword: pubsub publish graphql subscription 订阅发布
commands.description: 在 GraphQL 订阅中发布事件，通知所有订阅者数据变更。该命令是相关技术栈中的常用操作，掌握其用法对于日常开发和运维工作非常重要

extensions.name: 发布用户创建事件
extensions.cmd: pubsub.publish('USER_CREATED', { userCreated: { id: newUser.id, name: newUser.name, email: newUser.email } });

extensions.name: 发布消息通知事件
extensions.cmd: pubsub.publish(`MESSAGE_SENT_%{conversationId}%`, { messageSent: newMessage });

extensions.name: asyncIterator 订阅配置
extensions.cmd: Subscription: { %{eventName}%: { subscribe: (_, __, { pubsub }) => pubsub.asyncIterator('%{eventName}%') } }

eventName.description: 事件名称（与订阅名称一致）

commands.name: OAuth2 授权码换取访问令牌
commands.keyword: OAuth2 token 授权码 access token oauth
commands.description: 使用授权码向 OAuth2 授权服务器换取访问令牌（支持刷新令牌）

extensions.name: 客户端凭证模式
extensions.cmd:
POST https://%{authHost}%/oauth/token
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

grant_type=client_credentials&client_id=%{clientId}%&client_secret=%{clientSecret}%&scope=%{scope}%

extensions.name: 刷新令牌续期
extensions.cmd:
POST https://%{authHost}%/oauth/token
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

grant_type=refresh_token&refresh_token=%{refreshToken}%&client_id=%{clientId}%&client_secret=%{clientSecret}%

code.description: 授权服务器返回的授权码

commands.name: xss-clean 配置 XSS 防护
commands.keyword: xss-clean xss防护 xss-clean express 安全
commands.description: 使用 xss-clean 中间件防止跨站脚本攻击（XSS），过滤请求体、查询参数中的恶意 HTML/JS

extensions.name: XSS 防护（Express）
extensions.cmd: const xssClean = require('xss-clean'); app.use(express.json()); app.use(xssClean());

extensions.name: XSS + 输入验证组合
extensions.cmd: app.use(xssClean()); app.use((req, res, next) => { const schema = Joi.object({ name: Joi.string().max(100).required() }).validate(req.body); if (schema.error) return res.status(400).json({ error: schema.error.message }); next(); });

commands.name: makeExecutableSchema 创建 GraphQL Schema
commands.keyword: makeExecutableSchema graphql schema schema构建
commands.description: 使用 @graphql-tools/schema 的 makeExecutableSchema 从 typeDefs 和 resolvers 构建可执行 GraphQL schema

data.cmd: const { makeExecutableSchema } = require('@graphql-tools/schema'); const schema = makeExecutableSchema({ typeDefs: gql`%{typeDefs}%`, resolvers });

extensions.name: 从文件构建 schema
extensions.cmd: const fs = require('fs'); const { makeExecutableSchema } = require('@graphql-tools/schema'); const typeDefs = fs.readFileSync('./schema.graphql', 'utf8'); const schema = makeExecutableSchema({ typeDefs, resolvers });

extensions.name: 带 schemaDirectives
extensions.cmd: const { makeExecutableSchema } = require('@graphql-tools/schema'); const schema = makeExecutableSchema({ typeDefs, resolvers, schemaDirectives: { auth: AuthDirective } });

commands.name: express-mongo-sanitize NoSQL 注入防护
commands.keyword: mongo-sanitize nosql注入防护 安全 express
commands.description: 使用 express-mongo-sanitize 防止 NoSQL 注入攻击，过滤请求中的 $ 字符和 . 字符

extensions.name: NoSQL 注入防护
extensions.cmd: const mongoSanitize = require('express-mongo-sanitize'); app.use(mongoSanitize()); // 自动过滤 req.body req.query req.params 中的 $ 和 .

extensions.name: 允许特定字段
extensions.cmd: app.use(mongoSanitize({ allow: ['_id', 'email'] }));
